response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack and polyglot experience with a brief early-career exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments (~7 months in 2014-2015), but lacks the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows required by the role. There is no demonstrated experience in capital markets, investment banking, fixed income, or fixed-income derivatives, and no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle expertise at the required depth. Recent work is concentrated in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack domains, which do not align with the core mandatory requirements.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with 13+ years of professional experience
Exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
Solid communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
concerns: No 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development; C/C++ experience is limited and dated (2014-2015)
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle expertise; primary database experience is MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain background
